hooks.command:
echo 'IMPORTANT: Before reading full source files, use indxr MCP tools to minimize token usage:
- get_file_summary: understand a file without reading it (~300 tokens vs ~3000+)
- lookup_symbol / search_signatures: find specific functions/types
- read_source: read only the exact function/symbol you need (~100 tokens vs full file)
Only use Read when you need to EDIT a file, need exact formatting, or the file is not source code (e.g., CLAUDE.md, Cargo.toml).'

if printf '%s' "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+diff'; then echo 'IMPORTANT: Use indxr get_diff_summary MCP tool instead of git diff. It shows structural changes (added/removed/modified declarations) at ~200-500 tokens vs thousands for raw diffs. Example: get_diff_summary(since_ref: "main")'; fi
